name: Chronomaly Crystal Bones
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>先史遺産</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オーパーツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>クリスタル・ボーン
desc: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). When you do: You can Special Summon 1 "Chronomaly" monster from your hand or Graveyard, except "Chronomaly Crystal Bones".
mnst_eff: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). When you do: You can Special Summon 1 "Chronomaly" monster from your hand or Graveyard, except "Chronomaly Crystal Bones".
eff: If your opponent controls a monster and you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). When you do: You can Special Summon 1 "Chronomaly" monster from your hand or Graveyard, except "Chronomaly Crystal Bones".

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
